title: I can't download linux with wsl, Invalid command line option: --install
body:
wsl --install --online

Invalid command line option: --install
Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.

I need to see the linux versions I can download but I get this output. Why ?

answers.body: Check which build of windows you are on. I had this error when I was on builds less than 18917. You can find this in your "System Information" application
